about.name: Renato Xavier
about.bio1: Postdoctoral researcher at CEBRAP/FAPESP and visiting scholar at the Ibero-Amerikanisches Institut (IAI) in Berlin. He researches political theory and international relations, with a focus on W.E.B. Du Bois, algorithms, and race. In March 2026, we arrived in Kreuzberg: Bia, Tiãozinho (our German Spitz), and me. With luggage and no milk pot.
about.bio2: Notes from Berlin is an open notebook without pages.

primeira-semana.title: First Week
primeira-semana.teaser: We arrived. The apartment is an Altbau, there is no milk pot, and Germans recycle even alarm clocks.

segunda-semana.title: Second Week
segunda-semana.teaser: Mailbox label, milk pot found, and Spätify around the corner.

terceira-semana.title: Terceira Semana
terceira-semana.teaser: Banho do Tião, café no Reuterkiez, leiteira queimada e a sensação de que o presente sempre escapa.
